CREATE TABLE Rdls.RdlsVersion (     
                [DataBaseVersion] INT NOT NULL,             
                [TLSDomainSetupId] Rdls.SID,                
                [TLSSetupId] Rdls.MaxString);

CREATE TABLE Rdls.BackupSource (        
                    [LastBackupTime] Rdls.FILETIME,             
                    [LastRestoreTime] Rdls.FILETIME,            
                    [DbFileName] Rdls.MaxPath,                  
                    [ServerName] Rdls.MaxString,                
                    [TLSDomainSetupId] Rdls.SID,                
                    [TLSSetupId] Rdls.MaxString);

CREATE TABLE Rdls.RdlsSecrets(                  
                        [RdlsUUID]              Rdls.UUID NULL,         
                        [RdlsName]              Rdls.FQDN PRIMARY KEY,  
                        [PrimaryRdls]           INT,                    
                        [RdlsServerIdBlob]      Rdls.LongBinary,        
                        [RdlsRecentStatus]      Rdls.LastRunStatus,     
                        [RdlsExchKeyBlob]       Rdls.LongBinary NULL,

CREATE TABLE Rdls.IssuedLicense (               
                        [InternalLicenseID] INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   
                        [ExpireDate]        INT NOT NULL,               
                        [FloppyBIOS]        INT NOT NULL,               
                        [HarddiskSize]      INT NOT NULL,               
                        [InternalKeyPackId] INT NOT NULL,               
                        [IssueDate]         INT NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE Rdls.LicensedPack (                
                        [InternalKeyPackId]     INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, 
                        [ActivationDate]        INT NOT NULL,           
                        [AgreementType]         Rdls.Byte NOT NULL,     
                        [ChannelOfPurchase]     Rdls.Byte NOT NULL,     
                        [ExpirationDate]        INT NOT NULL,           
                        [KeyPackStatus]	        Rdls.Byte NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE Rdls.LICPACKDESCRECORD (           
                        [InternalKeyPackId] INT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,   
                        [LangId] INT NOT NULL,                          
                        [LastModifyTime] Rdls.FILETIME NOT NULL,        
                        [CompanyName] Rdls.MaxString,                   
                        [EntryStatus] Rdls.Byte,                        
                        [ProductDesc] Rdls.MaxString,

CREATE TABLE Rdls.WorkStorage (         
                        [JobType] INT NOT NULL,                 
                        [RestartTime] INT NOT NULL,             
                        [ScheduledTime] INT NOT NULL,           
                        [Data] Rdls.LongBinary);

CREATE TYPE [Rdls].[Byte] FROM TINYINT NULL;                      
            CREATE TYPE [Rdls].[Word] FROM SMALLINT NULL;                     
            CREATE TYPE [Rdls].[DWORD] FROM INT NULL;                         
            CREATE TYPE [Rdls].[FILETIME] FROM BIGINT NULL;                   
            CREATE TYPE [Rdls].[LastRunStatus] FROM [varbinary](20) NULL;     
            CREATE TYPE [Rdls].[NetBiosName] F
CREATE SEQUENCE Rdls.KeypackIdCounter AS INT START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1
CREATE SEQUENCE [Rdls].[LicenseIdCounter] AS INT START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1
